mbc.name: Milwaukee Boot Company
mbc.image_style: warm golden light, outdoor and urban settings, rich leather tones, editorial documentary photography feel, gritty authentic textures, natural shadows, no white studio backgrounds
mbc.brand_voice: Confident, understated, craftsman-proud. We don't shout — we let the leather do the talking. Warm but not twee. Aspirational without being inaccessible. Short sentences. No fluff. Speak to a man who knows what he wants and values things built to last.

dos: Lead with feeling and experience, not features
Use sensory language — texture, weight, smell of leather
Reference real places, real moments, real wear
Let the product name appear naturally — not forced
Anchor copy in the campaign theme
Use lowercase styling for a relaxed, editorial tone where appropriate
donts: Never use the word 'affordable' or imply the product is cheap
Never use corporate or salesy language (e.g. 'grab yours', 'don't miss out')
Never use exclamation marks more than once per piece of copy
Never mention competitors or compare to other brands
Never make claims about durability that sound like a warranty
Never use generic lifestyle filler phrases like 'live your best life'
Never use passive voice — always active and direct

scenes.name: urban_loft
scenes.description: Warm loft apartment interior. Exposed brick wall, large industrial windows with city view. Warm amber lamp light. Hardwood floors. Man standing with coffee mug, looking out window.

scenes.name: city_street
scenes.description: Urban city street, golden hour. Cobblestone or clean pavement. City buildings softly blurred in background. Man walking confidently, shot from waist down to show full leg and shoe.

scenes.name: coffee_shop
scenes.description: Upscale coffee shop interior. Warm wood tones, marble counter, soft morning light from large windows. Man seated at bar stool or standing at counter, laptop nearby.

scenes.name: office_modern
scenes.description: Modern open-plan office. Floor-to-ceiling glass, city views. Clean desk setup. Man standing by window or walking through office space, professional but relaxed.

scenes.name: weekend_market
scenes.description: Outdoor weekend market or farmers market. Natural morning light, green trees, people softly blurred in background. Man browsing, relaxed weekend energy.

scenes.name: industrial_exterior
scenes.description: Industrial building exterior. Brick walls, metal doors, urban alley. Overcast natural light. Man leaning against wall or walking, editorial street style feel.

mc.name: Moral Code
mc.image_style: clean minimal lifestyle photography, bright natural light, refined urban and professional settings, neutral tones, understated luxury, crisp shadows, contemporary editorial
mc.brand_voice: Polished, minimal, intentional. Quiet confidence. We speak to people who've moved past the need to prove anything. Clean prose, no filler, no hype. Every word earns its place. Sophisticated without being cold.

dos: Use clean, minimal language — fewer words, more meaning
Speak to quiet confidence and intentional living
Reference quality of materials and considered design
Use white space in copy — short paragraphs, clean rhythm
Let the product speak; the copy provides context, not hype
Anchor copy in the campaign theme with restraint
donts: Never use hyperbole or superlatives (best, ultimate, perfect)
Never sound loud, urgent, or desperate for attention
Never use slang or overly casual language
Never use filler phrases that dilute the message

scenes.name: minimal_interior
scenes.description: Minimalist apartment interior. White walls, concrete floor, clean lines. Soft diffused morning light. Man or woman standing, looking out window.

scenes.name: marble_lobby
scenes.description: Upscale hotel or office marble lobby. Cool neutral tones. Man walking through space, polished and confident.

scenes.name: city_terrace
scenes.description: Rooftop terrace or outdoor cafe. City skyline in background. Clean architectural lines. Morning light, coffee in hand.

scenes.name: gallery_space
scenes.description: Modern art gallery or museum. White walls, polished concrete floor, natural skylights. Person walking through exhibition space.
